title: Career Opportunity Teacher at CL Educate

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at CL Educate
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!
